channel.title: double pointer on changcui
channel.description: Recent content in double pointer on changcui

item.title: Find the Duplicate Number
item.description: // 思路一：同剑指 offer class Solution { public: int findDuplicate(vector<int>& nums) { for (int i = 0; i < nums.size(); i++) { while (nums[i] != i + 1) { if (nums[nums[i]-1] == nums[i]) return nums[i]; swap(nums[i], nums[nums[i]-1]); } } return -1; } }; // Runtime: 12 ms, faster than 67.11% of C++ online submissions for Find the Duplicate Number. // Memory Usage: 7.6 MB, less than 100.00% of C++ online submissions for Find the Duplicate Number.

item.title: 和为S的两个数字
item.description: class Solution { public: vector<int> FindNumbersWithSum(vector<int> array,int sum) { int i = 0, j = array.size() - 1; while (i < j) { int s = array[i] + array[j]; if (s == sum) return {array[i], array[j]}; else if (s < sum) i++; else j--; } return {}; } }; // 运行时间：6ms // 占用内存：504k

item.title: 和为S的连续正数序列
item.description: // 思路一：数学法，找规律，分成奇偶两种情况，判断边界条件 class Solution { public: vector<vector<int> > FindContinuousSequence(int sum) { vector<vector<int> > result; for (int i = sqrt(sum * 2); i >= 2; i--) { if (i & 1 && sum % i == 0 && (sum / i - (i - 1)/2) > 0) { vector<int> output; int begin = sum / i - (i - 1) / 2; while (begin <= sum / i + (i - 1)/2) output.
